title: Chaotic Infinity
description: Chaotic Infinity is a palladium addon made specifically for the currently existing Sonic addon for the mod. It showcases some code I have for another mod I'm working on. This mod adds chaos energy based powers and forms! Expanding on chaos energy a bit.
body:
This mod adds Fleetway Super Sonic, Nazo and Shadic to the game as powersets through the use of the palladium mod! Nazo and Fleetway Super Sonic are hedgehogs from the Sonic franchise and fandom made up of chaos energy. Nazo being a fanmade hedgehog using a scrapped super form design from Sonic X. I managed to do my best to replicate their abilities. Shadic is a fusion of Sonic and Shadow achieved through the use of chaos control. Combining their powers and abilities.



Shoutout to empowered_novice and RealGamer710 for allowing me to make this addon mod.
